description: Engineering and creative services business site — hero, services, portfolio, contact form

editable_files.htdocs/index.html: Homepage — hero section, services, portfolio, contact form with AJAX submission
editable_files.htdocs/styles.css: All site styles — dark theme, neon yellow accent, card layout, responsive breakpoints
editable_files.htdocs/js/animations.js: GSAP scroll animations, smooth scrolling, nav toggle, morphing dot triggers
editable_files.htdocs/js/morphing-dots.js: Three.js particle system — shape morphing, mouse parallax, auto-rotation
editable_files.htdocs/thank-you.html: Standalone thank-you page (legacy, form now uses inline thank-you)
